open_items.text: Verify and resolve the single bounded follow-up item identified during the seed wake of the first tiny live autonomy pilot.

response: Seeded the first tiny live autonomy pilot. Identified one bounded follow-up item and scheduled a single wake to resolve it using the specified recall target.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the open follow-up item from the initial seed wake and close the loop on the pilot's first bounded action.
